## Description
Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. If adding data, cite the official sources used.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Data Addition (adding new saints, popes, or miracles)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## Checklist
- [ ] I have read the `CONTRIBUTING.md` document.
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have provided official sources for any historical data added.
